prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京综合类最低录取位次分别为约863名、1071名、838名、569名、1157名，整体波动较大，无明显单调趋势；2024年位次前移至569名为近年最优，2025年则大幅后移至1157名，近两年波动幅度约588名，2025年基准位次约1157名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年19人、2022年21人、2023年12人、2024年11人、2025年10人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划招生13人，较2025年增加3人（扩招30%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年），属全国顶尖高校梯队，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿数量较多）、师德师风等事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第42位（较热），综合热度约98.9万，关注度中等偏上；2021年曾出现投档线异常信号（河南理科华五倒数第一），但近年无直接断档记录；拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、生物学A+、临床医学A+、工商管理A+等均为全国顶尖水平，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合；北京考生总数从2025年65434人增至2026年84900人（增幅约29.7%），竞争显著加剧；该校校本部位于上海（university_home_province），北京考生属跨省报考；该校在北京招生占比约1.1%–2.5%（2021年19人占2.54%，2023年12人占1.19%，2024年11人占1.45%），占比不高但绝对人数稳定在10–19人区间。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1157名、2026年扩招30%（计划10→13人）带来的位次后移效应、北京考生总数大幅增加约29.7%带来的竞争加剧、以及学校声誉偏负面的轻微抑制作用；预测2026年最低录取位次约1395名，波动区间1235–1555名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（拔尖英才试点班）
- 电子信息类（TEEE试点班）
- 具身智能（拔尖英才试点班）
- 机器人工程（自主智能领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（集成电路英才班）
- 电子信息类（计算机永强试验班）
- 电气工程及其自动化（思源试点班）
- 理科试验班类（物理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物科学类
- 法学试验班（涉外法治特班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1395名，区间1235–1555名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主攻方向（电子信息类、电气工程等），一档王牌专业（人工智能、机器人工程等）作为冲刺，三档专业（法学试验班、生物科学类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<1235名）可重点冲击一档A+学科专业；位次接近区间上限（>1555名）则应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Comprehensive category were approximately 863, 1071, 838, 569, and 1157 respectively, showing significant fluctuations with no clear monotonic trend; in 2024, the ranking moved forward to 569, the best in recent years, while in 2025 it moved back sharply to 1157, with a fluctuation range of about 588 places in the last two years, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1157; the university's enrollment plan for Beijing Comprehensive category: 19 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year; the 2026 plan is to enroll 13 students, an increase of 3 (30% expansion) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will notably alleviate the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (high number of retractions) and teacher ethics incidents, which may mildly suppress some candidates' application intentions; Douyin popularity ranks 42nd overall (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 989,000, indicating moderate to high attention; in 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (Henan Science ranked last among the Five Eastern China Universities), but no direct record of admission gaps in recent years; it has 28 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Biology A+, Clinical Medicine A+, and Business Administration A+, all at the national top level, with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines; the total number of Beijing candidates increased from 65,434 in 2025 to 84,900 in 2026 (an increase of about 29.7%), significantly intensifying competition; the university's main campus is located in Shanghai (university_home_province), so Beijing candidates are applying across provinces; the university's enrollment proportion in Beijing is about 1.1%–2.5% (19 in 2021 accounting for 2.54%, 12 in 2023 accounting for 1.19%, 11 in 2024 accounting for 1.45%), a low proportion but with absolute numbers stable in the 10–19 range.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1157, the ranking backward effect from the 2026 enrollment expansion of 30% (plan 10→13), the intensified competition from a significant increase of about 29.7% in Beijing candidates, and the mild suppression from the slightly negative university reputation; the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 1395, with a fluctuation range of 1235–1555.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (TEEE Pilot Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Robotics Engineering (Autonomous Intelligent Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Talent Class)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Siyuan Pilot Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Sciences
- Law Experimental Class (International Rule of Law Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1395, range 1235–1555. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Law Experimental Class, Biological Sciences) as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<1235) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 A+ discipline majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>1555) should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety net majors.
